content.verdict: Dreams Luxury Suites sits on the Imerovigli cliff — Santorini's highest point — with a rare signature feature: indoor-outdoor heated pools that let you swim year-round with the caldera as backdrop. Every one of the 19 suites has its own jacuzzi or plunge pool on a private terrace facing the sunset. The scale is boutique, the design is elegantly simple (whitewashed stone, hand-crafted stone, restrained luxury), and the adults-only policy keeps the atmosphere hushed and romantic. Service is personal — staff learn your name and preferences on day one. For honeymooners looking for intimacy and view without the Oia tourist crush, Dreams is one of the finest addresses on the island.
content.best_room: Honeymoon Suite with private heated pool and caldera view — cave-vaulted ceilings, generous terrace, and a pool calibrated for two. The Dreams Villa with private heated pool is the splurge option: more space, larger pool, complete seclusion.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Walk the Imerovigli-Oia caldera path in the morning (spectacular), taxi back, spa afternoon, hotel-restaurant dinner at sunset.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Beach day at Perissa or Vlychada, dinner at Metaxi Mas in Exo Gonia
itinerary_7_nights.description: Beach day at Perissa or Vlychada, dinner at Metaxi Mas in Exo Gonia.

caveats: Imerovigli involves walking and stairs throughout the village.
The hotel's on-site dining is intimate but limited — plan most dinners at other Imerovigli spots (Mezzo, La Maison, Anogi).
Caldera-view angles vary by suite level; pay up for higher units.
Summer rates rise steeply — May/June and September are the sweet spot.

faqs.q: What makes Dreams different from other caldera hotels?
faqs.a: The indoor-outdoor heated pool is unusual in Santorini and makes shoulder-season stays comfortable. Every suite has its own jacuzzi — not all Santorini hotels offer that standard.

faqs.q: How does Imerovigli compare to Oia?
faqs.a: Same caldera view, same sunset, far fewer tourists. 15 minutes by car or 1.5-hour walk to Oia when you want the scene.

faqs.q: Does every room face the caldera?
faqs.a: Yes — Dreams is built on the cliff edge with caldera-facing suites only.
5-6 months ahead for summer; 2-3 months for shoulder season.
Treatments are offered in a small wellness area or in-suite. Not a full spa pavilion — but quality is high.
